zh.lifeSummary: 當John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith於1300年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾時，他的父親John de Graham of Dundaff55歲，母親Marjory Halliday30歲。他於大約1320年與Mary II, Countess of Menteith結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1347年2月28日在英國英格蘭米德萊可享年47歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith于1300年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾时，他的父亲John de Graham of Dundaff55岁，母亲Marjory Halliday30岁。他于大约1320年与Mary II, Countess of Menteith结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1347年2月28日在英国英格兰米德萊可享年47岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可。

nameMeanings.name: Graham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Graham (as well as Grantham, Grandham, and Granham). See also Grantham .

Irish (especially Ulster): in Ireland Graham is generally the Scottish name, but it has additionally been adopted as an Anglicized form of both Ó Creacháin (see Crehan ) and Ó Gormghaile (see Gormley ).

History: The surname Graham was taken to Scotland at the beginning of the 12th century by the Norman baron William de Graham, holder of the manor of Grantham in Lincolnshire, from whom many if not all modern bearers are probably descended. The chief of Clan Graham is the Duke of Montrose.

variants.name: Greim
meanings: South German: from a short form of a compound personal name beginning with the element grīm ‘mask, helmet’.

variants.name: Grahm
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): shortened form of   Graham  .

variants.name: Grantham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, of uncertain origin. The final element is Old English hām ‘homestead’; the first may be Old English grand ‘gravel’ or perhaps a personal name Granta, which probably originated as a byname meaning ‘snarler’. See also Graham .

variants.name: Grahame
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Graham  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 261, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith was born in 1300, in Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John de Graham of Dundaff, was 55 and his mother, Marjory Halliday, was 30. He married Mary II, Countess of Menteith about 1320. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 28 February 1347, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith est né en 1300, à Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Graham of Dundaff, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Marjory Halliday, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mary II, Countess of Menteith environ 1320. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 28 février 1347, à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith 1300 in Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Graham of Dundaff 55 und seine Mutter Marjory Halliday 30. Er hat um 1320 Mary II, Countess of Menteith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Februar 1347 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith è nato il nel 1300 nel Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Graham of Dundaff, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Marjory Halliday, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Mary II, Countess of Menteith circa 1320. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 28 febbraio 1347, nel Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteithが1300年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Graham of Dundaffは55歳，母Marjory Hallidayは30歳であった。約1320年にMary II, Countess of Menteithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1347年2月28日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスで47歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith(이)가 1300년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Graham of Dundaff(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjory Halliday(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 Mary II, Countess of Menteith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1347년 2월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith nasceu em 1300, em Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Graham of Dundaff, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Marjory Halliday, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary II, Countess of Menteith aproximadamente 1320. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1347, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith родился в 1300 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Graham of Dundaff было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjory Halliday, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary II, Countess of Menteith около 1320 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 28 февраля 1347 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Graham of Dundaff, 9th Earl of Menteith nació en 1300, en Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Graham of Dundaff, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Marjory Halliday, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Mary II, Countess of Menteith aproximadamente 1320. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 28 de febrero de 1347, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Middlesex, Inglaterra.
